出
출입국 심사 통계 대시보드 Korea Immigration Statistics
본 대시보드의 수치는 법무부 통계월보 기반 통계적 추정치이며 법적 효력이 없습니다.

관할구역 · 예상 소요일
색=관할 사무소의 예상 소요일 · 동그라미 크기=등록외국인 수 · 지역이나 사무소를 누르면 상세가 나옵니다
각 칸을 누르면 해당 사무소가 예측기에 반영됩니다
소요 6.5일 미만
6.5–7.2
7.2일 이상
동그라미 크기 = 등록외국인 수
지역별 외국인 유입·유출
색=월 순증감(신규 유입−유출) · 지역에 마우스를 올리면 상세 · 2026.05 기준
순증 (유입>유출)
순감 (유출>유입)

2022.01 → 2026.04
REAL
비자명칭 2022.012026.04변화율
데이터: 법무부 출입국·외국인정책본부 통계월보 · 등록외국인 시군구별 현황 (공공누리 1유형, 출처표시)
OLS Model · R²=0.958 · MAE 5.1% · 48mo actual (2022.01–2026.04)
사무소별 소요일 = 기준 × 부하지수^0.5 (부하지수=관할 등록외국인÷용량등급가정) · 산출근거: validation_report.md
--bg:#f7f8fa; --surface:#fff; --surface-2:#f0f2f5; --border:#e4e7ec; --border-strong:#d0d5dd; --text:#1a1f2b; --text-2:#667085; --text-3:#98a2b3; --accent:#2563eb; --accent-soft:#eff4ff; --green:#099268; --green-soft:#e6f4ef; --amber:#c8860a; --amber-soft:#fdf4e3; --red:#d64545; --red-soft:#fcebeb; --shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(16,24,40,.06),0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,.04); --map-land:#e8ebf0; --map-stroke:#cbd2dd; } [data-theme="dark"] { --bg:#0d1117; --surface:#161b22; --surface-2:#1c2333; --border:#262d3a; --border-strong:#333c4d; --text:#e6edf3; --text-2:#8b949e; --text-3:#5a636e; --accent:#4d8bf5; --accent-soft:#15233f; --green:#2dd4a7; --green-soft:#0d2620; --amber:#e8a830; --amber-soft:#2a1f0a; --red:#f0635a; --red-soft:#2a1011; --shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.4); --map-land:#1c2333; --map-stroke:#3a4453; } * { box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; } html { -webkit-text-size-adjust:100%; } body { background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,sans-serif; font-size:14px; line-height:1.5; -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; transition:background .3s,color .3s; } .mono { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; } .nav { height:56px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:0 24px; position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100; } .nav-brand { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; min-width:0; } .nav-mark { width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:8px; background:var(--accent); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:15px; flex-shrink:0; } .nav-title { font-weight:600; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:-.01em; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; } .nav-title span { color:var(--text-3); font-weight:400; font-size:12px; display:block; line-height:1.2; } .nav-actions { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; flex-shrink:0; } .icon-btn { height:34px; padding:0 12px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); color:var(--text-2); font-size:13px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; transition:all .15s; white-space:nowrap; } .icon-btn:hover { border-color:var(--border-strong); color:var(--text); } .icon-btn svg { width:16px; height:16px; } .lang-toggle { display:flex; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; overflow:hidden; } .lang-toggle button { height:34px; padding:0 12px; border:none; background:var(--surface); color:var(--text-3); font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; transition:all .15s; } .lang-toggle button.active { background:var(--accent); color:#fff; } .notice { background:var(--amber-soft); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); padding:8px 24px; font-size:12px; color:var(--amber); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; } .notice svg { flex-shrink:0; } .container { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:24px; } .page-head { margin-bottom:24px; } .page-head h1 { font-size:22px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-.02em; margin-bottom:4px; } .page-head p { color:var(--text-2); font-size:13px; } .kpi-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:16px; margin-bottom:24px; } .kpi { background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r); padding:18px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); } .kpi-top { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:12px; gap:8px; } .kpi-name { font-size:12px; color:var(--text-2); font-weight:500; } .kpi-tag { font-size:10px; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:20px; font-weight:600; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; white-space:nowrap; } .tag-real { background:var(--green-soft); color:var(--green); } .tag-pred { background:var(--accent-soft); color:var(--accent); } .tag-warn { background:var(--red-soft); color:var(--red); } .kpi-value { font-size:28px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-.02em; line-height:1; } .kpi-delta { font-size:12px; margin-top:8px; color:var(--text-2); } .kpi-delta .up { color:var(--green); font-weight:600; } .grid-main { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-bottom:16px; } .card { background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--r); box-shadow:var(--shadow); overflow:hidden; } .card-head { padding:16px 18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .card-title { font-size:14px; font-weight:600; } .card-sub { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:2px; } .card-body { padding:18px; } .chart-tabs { display:flex; gap:4px; background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:8px; padding:3px; } .chart-tab { padding:6px 12px; border:none; background:transparent; color:var(--text-2); font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:6px; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-weight:500; transition:all .15s; white-space:nowrap; } .chart-tab.active { background:var(--surface); color:var(--text); box-shadow:var(--shadow); } /* ── 일본식 단일 분석 패널: 탭으로 전환 ── */ .panel-tabs { display:flex; gap:6px; padding:14px 18px 0; flex-wrap:wrap; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); } .panel-tab { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; padding:9px 14px; border:none; cursor:pointer; background:var(--surface-2); color:var(--text-2); font-size:13px; font-weight:500; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; border-radius:8px 8px 0 0; transition:all .15s; border:1px solid transparent; border-bottom:none; } .panel-tab svg { width:16px; height:16px; flex-shrink:0; } .panel-tab:hover { color:var(--text); } .panel-tab.active { background:var(--accent); color:#fff; } .panel-tab .pt-label { white-space:nowrap; } .panel-view { display:none; } .panel-view.active { display:block; animation:fadeIn .2s ease; } @keyframes fadeIn { from{opacity:0} to{opacity:1} } .panel-head { padding:16px 18px 4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; } select { height:38px; padding:0 10px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); color:var(--text); font-size:14px; cursor:pointer; outline:none; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; width:100%; } select:focus { border-color:var(--accent); } .filter-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; } .filter-group label { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; } .map-container { position:relative; display:flex; justify-content:center; padding:8px; } #korea-map { width:100%; max-width:360px; height:auto; } .province { fill:var(--map-land); stroke:var(--map-stroke); stroke-width:0.5; transition:fill .2s; } .prov-cover { transition:fill-opacity .15s, stroke-width .15s; } .prov-cover:hover { stroke:var(--text); stroke-width:1.4; fill-opacity:0.92 !important; } .office-marker { cursor:pointer; } .office-marker circle.halo { transition:r .15s; } .office-marker:hover circle.core { stroke-width:2.5; } .map-tooltip { position:absolute; pointer-events:none; opacity:0; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border-strong); border-radius:8px; padding:10px 12px; font-size:12px; box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15); z-index:50; min-width:150px; transition:opacity .15s; } .map-tooltip.show { opacity:1; } .mt-name { font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; font-size:13px; } .mt-sub { color:var(--text-3); font-size:11px; margin-bottom:6px; } .mt-row { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:16px; color:var(--text-2); margin-top:3px; } .mt-row b { color:var(--text); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; } .map-legend { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:16px; padding:12px 18px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); flex-wrap:wrap; } .legend-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-2); } .legend-dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; } .rank-list { display:flex; flex-direction:column; } .rank-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:20px 64px 1fr 52px; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:9px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); cursor:pointer; transition:background .12s; border-radius:6px; } .rank-row:hover { background:var(--surface-2); } .rank-row.sel { background:var(--accent-soft); } .rank-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; } .rank-num { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; padding-left:6px; } .rank-name { font-size:13px; font-weight:500; } .rank-bar-bg { height:6px; background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; } .rank-bar { height:100%; border-radius:3px; transition:width .8s ease; } .rank-val { font-size:13px; font-weight:600; text-align:right; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; padding-right:6px; } .trend-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:13px; } .trend-table th { text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; color:var(--text-3); font-size:11px; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); white-space:nowrap; } .trend-table td { padding:11px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); } .trend-table tr:last-child td { border:none; } .trend-table .num { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; text-align:right; } .trend-table .code { font-weight:600; } .chg-up { color:var(--green); font-weight:600; } .chg-down { color:var(--red); font-weight:600; } .chg-flat { color:var(--text-3); } .table-wrap { overflow-x:auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch; } /* ── Inline Estimator (RetroHazard-style, same-page) ── */ .estimator { margin-bottom:16px; } .est-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:14px; align-items:end; } .est-output { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr; gap:16px; margin-top:18px; } .est-result { padding:20px; background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:10px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; } .est-result-top { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:10px; } .est-days { font-size:42px; font-weight:700; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; line-height:1; transition:color .25s; } .est-unit { font-size:18px; color:var(--text-2); font-weight:600; } .est-label { font-size:12px; color:var(--text-2); margin-top:8px; } .est-ci { font-size:12px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:6px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; } .est-eta { font-size:13px; margin-top:10px; padding-top:10px; border-top:1px dashed var(--border); } .est-eta b { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; color:var(--text); } .est-bd { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:9px; justify-content:center; } .est-bd-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; font-size:12px; } .est-bd-label { color:var(--text-2); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; } .est-bd-bar-wrap { flex:1; height:5px; background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; max-width:90px; } .est-bd-bar { height:100%; border-radius:3px; } .est-bd-val { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-weight:600; min-width:54px; text-align:right; } .est-note { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:10px; line-height:1.5; } /* ── Visa Forecast table ── */ .visa-fc-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:13px; } .visa-fc-table th { text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; color:var(--text-3); font-size:11px; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); white-space:nowrap; } .visa-fc-table td { padding:11px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); vertical-align:middle; } .visa-fc-table tr:last-child td { border:none; } .visa-fc-table tr { transition:background .12s; } .visa-fc-table tbody tr:hover { background:var(--surface-2); } .vf-code { font-weight:700; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; } .vf-days { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-weight:600; } .vf-bar-wrap { height:6px; background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; width:100px; } .vf-bar { height:100%; border-radius:3px; } .vf-note { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); } .footer { border-top:1px solid var(--border); margin-top:24px; padding:20px 24px; text-align:center; color:var(--text-3); font-size:12px; } .footer .mono { display:inline-block; margin-top:4px; } /* ── Responsive: desktop → tablet → mobile ── */ @media(max-width:1000px){ .kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr} .grid-main{grid-template-columns:1fr} .est-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr} .est-output{grid-template-columns:1fr} } @media(max-width:600px){ .container{padding:16px} .nav{padding:0 14px} .notice{padding:8px 14px} .kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:10px} .kpi{padding:14px} .kpi-value{font-size:22px} .nav-title span{display:none} .nav-title{font-size:13px} .est-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .page-head h1{font-size:19px} .chart-tab{padding:6px 9px; font-size:11px} .icon-btn span{display:none} .icon-btn{padding:0 9px} .est-days{font-size:34px} .footer{padding:18px 14px} }
出

관할구역 · 예상 소요일
색=관할 사무소의 예상 소요일 · 동그라미 크기=등록외국인 수 · 지역이나 사무소를 누르면 상세가 나옵니다
각 칸을 누르면 해당 사무소가 예측기에 반영됩니다

데이터: 법무부 출입국·외국인정책본부 통계월보 · 등록외국인 시군구별 현황 (공공누리 1유형, 출처표시)
OLS Model · R²=0.958 · MAE 5.1% · 48mo actual (2022.01–2026.04)
사무소별 소요일 = 기준 × 부하지수^0.5 (부하지수=관할 등록외국인÷용량등급가정) · 산출근거: validation_report.md
